creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: Sorry for not replying, I pretty sure I sent a private email but it might have been lost as my previous email provider was a bit dodgy. Unfortunately all my MIPS64 boxes (EdgeRouter Lite) are either decommissioned or migrated to Linux in production so I don't have any available. I'm going to close this ticket due to lack of ability to test and I'm not running FreeBSD on mips64 anymore.
